tools.Name: TradingAgents
tools.Description: A multi-agent framework that mirrors real-world trading firms by deploying specialized LLM-powered agents to collaboratively evaluate market conditions.
tools.Use_Case: Automated financial market analysis and research support.

tools.Name: Maigret
tools.Description: An OSINT tool that gathers a dossier on a person using only their username by checking 3,000+ websites.
tools.Use_Case: Social media account investigation and digital footprint research.

tools.Name: PPT Master
tools.Description: An AI-powered workflow that generates natively editable PowerPoint files from documents like PDFs or URLs, rather than creating flattened images.
